nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Ara
nodes.summary: Ara（Ara）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如藍黃金剛鸚鵡、藍喉金剛鸚鵡、栗额金刚鹦鹉等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 藍喉金剛鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 藍喉金剛鸚鵡（Ara glaucogularis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如藍喉金剛鸚鵡。

nodes.name: 藍喉金剛鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 藍喉金剛鸚鵡（Blue-throated macaw，学名 Ara glaucogularis），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。
nodes.shortSummary: 藍喉金剛鸚鵡（學名：Ara glaucogularis，原先為Ara caninde）是棲息於玻利维亚東部一個名為Los Llanos de Moxos小地區的獨有品種。時至2005年，野外的藍喉金剛鸚鵡相信只剩餘少於200隻。牠們消失的主要原因是為當地及國際鳥類貿易造成的非法…

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2014 this species was designated by law as a natural patrimony of Bolivia. Until 2010, it was hunted by native people to make feathered "Moxeño" headdresses for "machetero" ritual dances. Recent population and range estimates suggest that about 208–303 adult individuals remain in the wild. Its demise was brought upon by nesting competition, avian predation, and a small native range, exacerbated by indigenous hunting and capture for the pet trade. Current threats continue to include hunting and trapping as well as tree cutting, invasive species, disease, and use of powders or foams used to extinguish fires. It is listed as Critically Endangered by the IUCN in the wild and is protected by trading prohibitions. The name "Wagler's macaw" is in honor of German herpetologist and ornithologist Johann Georg Wagler, who processed many of Johan Baptist von Spix's Brazilian collections at LMU Munich, and first described the blue macaws for a European readership in Monographia Psittacorum (1832)
